name: French Silk Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 3 ounces unsweetened baking chocolate in a double boiler.
2. In a large bowl, cream 3/4 cup butter and 1 cup sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add melted chocolate and 1½ teaspoons vanilla to the mixture.
4. Beat in 3 eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared crust and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
